TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 1895.4.17 Maguan katatelekan (1895.4.17 ť¶¨ťóúśĘĚÁīĄÁįĹŤ®ā) == 1894 miheca malengat ko kalalood no Dipong ato Mancin, mapidah ko Mancin, micomok ko Dipong a masasowal, kinapinapina ko kasasowalan saka itini to i 1895 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad itira i minato Maguan no Dipong a Chunfan hotel masasitilid to Maguan katatelek, laloma' no katatelekan masaheci ko 'orip no Taywan Penho nai Mancin paliyasen ko Dipong. O 'alomanay finawlan no Taywan caay pihayda tonini itiya, o saka saan irama niyaro' ko kapidahan no Mancin i, mana keriten ko Taywan. O kafana'an no Taywan a tamdaw i, wata ko raay ko kalaloodan no Dipong Mancin haw i, o karawrawan to saka fecol no tiyadan ko nihaenan, kasasowalan han no tosaay kitakit Dipong ato Mancin ko saka'orip no Taywan. Itini to masapinang o awaayay ko no niyah kitakit ko Taywan, padeteng sa o tao ko misetekay to ka'oripan likisi. Ono niyah a sapipa'oripaw ko finawlan no Taywan mipalowad to liciay "Taywan nipakoniraan kitakit" sanay a lalowadan, o saka saan i o sapiafadaw to romi'ad saka hapinangaw no kasakitakit a mikihar toni toloay kitakit a midemok (ikor misahirateng to sapatiko to Mancin kitakit nasa), ikor caay to ka laheci, kiemel ko sofitay no Dipong itiya toya mihecaan malefek ko Taywan, saka 50 mihecaan no Dipong mikowan a to'ek to Taywan. O pikowan no Dipong to Taywan i 20-30 mihecaan ranikay ko kacomahanan itiya, nano o mapakomaanay a sera fahal sa o macomahaday nengnengen no hekal, naka o kasasiiked no finacadan i Taywan a ponka, lekakawa, selal malatiih, o pikowan no Dipong to Taywan samatiya to o sofitay ko harateng mirofirof to kalaloodan, kasaniyaro' malefek to no matatekoay kitakit ko pilood. Paherek ko lalood no saka tosa i, o palowad no Taywan ato pinangan no finawlan matatifac to i sakalay Congko, oya to masararemay harateng pinangan a Conghuaminko sifo ko mikowanay to Taywan, honihoni ira ko kasasiwtoc mapapatapatayay a demak, mangalef nano mapidahay kalalood no laloma'an no kitakit malaliway a masaso'otay 'ofad a tamdaw tayni i Taywan, awaayay ko no niyah kitakit a fanawlan no Taywan awaay to ko sapipili' o hayda sanay to, o iraay ho a sowal, ponka, harateng, o malasawaday to a matafo, o latiihay a demak padoedo sa a masadak. Mitiko toninmi a Maguan katatelekan itiya a finawlan no Taywan to saki niyah a 'orip awaayto ko pakayraan, o nika paherek to no kalalood mala o milaliway kahiceraan saka tangasa anini o caay to ko papakaliyas tonini kararoma' no 'orip, misaliyaliyaw ko likisi pasifana' titaanan, o awaayay ko kitakit dengan o tala sanay to pilili'elan. O pahecian no Taywan anini o papotalay mikowanay a Conghuaminko, o nano pikinafalah no 'alomanay tamdaw ko sapicikeroh to ikor no saka nikapolongan a mafalic malalen ko kalalikakawa, sakararid finawlan no Taywan i nikapolongan a telak ko sapilifet to sapi'emod no Congku a parana'an, matiniay a 'orip masakohkohay ato kaoratan, samaanen ko rakat to ikor? Samaanen minengneng ko pakasawayay to nikapolongan a mapoheday nai papotalay tayni a Conghuaminko? O pilifet to taneng no aniniay finawlan no Taywan koni.
S.PHON: == ****.*.** ma*o~u~uan katat…ô…ĺ…ôkan (****.*.** ******) == **** mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺ…ôŇčat ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u man ¶in, mapi…¨~…ģańß ko~u man ¶in, mi ¶o~umo~uk ko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a masaso~uwa…ĺ, kinapinapina ko~u kasaso~uwa…ĺan saka itini to~u i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ itira i minato~u ma*o~u~uan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a ¶ńßo~u~unfan ńßo~ut…ô…ĺ masasiti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u ma*o~u~uan katat…ô…ĺ…ôk, …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u katat…ô…ĺ…ôkan masańß…ô ¶i ko~u °o~urip no~u tajwan p…ônńßo~u nai man ¶in pa…ĺijas…ôn ko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. o~u °a…ĺo~umanaj finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan ¶aaj pińßaj…¨~…ģa to~unini itija, o~u saka saan irama nijaro~u ° ko~u kapi…¨~…ģańßan no~u man ¶in i, mana k…ôrit…ôn ko~u tajwan. o~u kafana °an no~u tajwan a tam…¨~…ģaw i, wata ko~u raaj ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč man ¶in ńßaw i, o~u karawrawan to~u saka f…ô ¶o~u…ĺ no~u tija…¨~…ģan ko~u nińßa…ônan, kasaso~uwa…ĺan ńßan no~u to~usaaj kitakit …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u man ¶in ko~u saka °o~urip no~u tajwan. itini to~u masapinaŇč o~u awaajaj ko~u no~u nijańß kitakit ko~u tajwan, pa…¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč sa o~u tao~u ko~u mis…ôt…ôkaj to~u ka °o~uripan …ĺikisi. o~uno~u nijańß a sapipa °o~uripaw ko~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan mipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺi ¶iaj "tajwan nipako~uniraan kitakit" sanaj a …ĺa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģan, o~u saka saan i o~u sapiafa…¨~…ģaw to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saka ńßapinaŇčaw no~u kasakitakit a mikińßar to~uni to~u…ĺo~uaj kitakit a mi…¨~…ģ…ômo~uk (iko~ur misańßirat…ôŇč to~u sapatiko~u to~u man ¶in kitakit nasa), iko~ur ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺańß…ô ¶i, ki…ôm…ô…ĺ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itija to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan ma…ĺ…ôf…ôk ko~u tajwan, saka ** mińß…ô ¶aan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč miko~uwan a to~u °…ôk to~u tajwan. o~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u tajwan i **-** mińß…ô ¶aan ranikaj ko~u ka ¶o~umańßanan itija, nano~u o~u mapako~umaanaj a s…ôra fańßa…ĺ sa o~u ma ¶o~umańßa…¨~…ģaj n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, naka o~u kasasiik…ô…¨~…ģ no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i tajwan a po~unka, …ĺ…ôkakawa, s…ô…ĺa…ĺ ma…ĺatiińß, o~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u tajwan samatija to~u o~u so~ufitaj ko~u ńßarat…ôŇč miro~ufiro~uf to~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan, kasanijaro~u ° ma…ĺ…ôf…ôk to~u no~u matat…ôko~uaj kitakit ko~u pi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ. pańß…ôr…ôk ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u saka to~usa i, o~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ no~u tajwan ato~u pinaŇčan no~u finaw…ĺan matatifa ¶ to~u i saka…ĺaj ¶o~uŇčko~u, o~uja to~u masarar…ômaj ńßarat…ôŇč pinaŇčan a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan, ńßo~unińßo~uni ira ko~u kasasiwto~u ¶ mapapatapatajaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, maŇča…ĺ…ôf nano~u mapi…¨~…ģańßaj ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an no~u kitakit ma…ĺa…ĺiwaj a masaso~u °o~utaj °o~ufa…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw tajni i tajwan, awaajaj ko~u no~u nijańß kitakit a fanaw…ĺan no~u tajwan awaaj to~u ko~u sapipi…ĺi ° o~u ńßaj…¨~…ģa sanaj to~u, o~u iraaj ńßo~u a so~uwa…ĺ, po~unka, ńßarat…ôŇč, o~u ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģaj to~u a matafo~u, o~u …ĺatiińßaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u sa a masa…¨~…ģak. mitiko~u to~uninmi a ma*o~u~uan katat…ô…ĺ…ôkan itija a finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan to~u saki nijańß a °o~urip awaajto~u ko~u pakajraan, o~u nika pańß…ôr…ôk to~u no~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ ma…ĺa o~u mi…ĺa…ĺiwaj kańßi ¶…ôraan saka taŇčasa anini o~u ¶aaj to~u ko~u papaka…ĺijas to~unini kararo~uma ° no~u °o~urip, misa…ĺija…ĺijaw ko~u …ĺikisi pasifana ° titaanan, o~u awaajaj ko~u kitakit …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u ta…ĺa sanaj to~u pi…ĺi…ĺi °…ô…ĺan. o~u pańß…ô ¶ian no~u tajwan anini o~u papo~uta…ĺaj miko~uwanaj a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u, o~u nano~u pikinafa…ĺańß no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u iko~ur no~u saka nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a mafa…ĺi ¶ ma…ĺa…ĺ…ôn ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺikakawa, sakarari…¨~…ģ finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan i nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a t…ô…ĺak ko~u sapi…ĺif…ôt to~u sapi °…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u~u a parana °an, matiniaj a °o~urip masako~uńßko~uńßaj ato~u kao~uratan, samaan…ôn ko~u rakat to~u iko~ur? samaan…ôn min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u pakasawajaj to~u nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a mapo~uńß…ô…¨~…ģaj nai papo~uta…ĺaj tajni a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u? o~u pi…ĺif…ôt to~u tan…ôŇč no~u aniniaj finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan ko~uni.
S.FORM: == 1895.4.17 Maguan katatelekan (1895.4.17 ť¶¨ťóúśĘĚÁīĄÁįĹŤ®ā) == 1894 miheca malengat ko kalalood no Dipong ato Mancin, mapidah ko Mancin, micomok ko Dipong a masasowal, kinapinapina ko kasasowalan saka itini to i 1895 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad itira i minato Maguan no Dipong a Chunfan hotel masasitilid to Maguan katatelek, laloma' no katatelekan masaheci ko 'orip no Taywan Penho nai Mancin paliyasen ko Dipong. O 'alomanay finawlan no Taywan caay pihayda tonini itiya, o saka saan irama niyaro' ko kapidahan no Mancin i, mana keriten ko Taywan. O kafana'an no Taywan a tamdaw i, wata ko raay ko kalaloodan no Dipong Mancin haw i, o karawrawan to saka fecol no tiyadan ko nihaenan, kasasowalan han no tosaay kitakit Dipong ato Mancin ko saka'orip no Taywan. Itini to masapinang o awaayay ko no niyah kitakit ko Taywan, padeteng sa o tao ko misetekay to ka'oripan likisi. Ono niyah a sapipa'oripaw ko finawlan no Taywan mipalowad to liciay "Taywan nipakoniraan kitakit" sanay a lalowadan, o saka saan i o sapiafadaw to romi'ad saka hapinangaw no kasakitakit a mikihar toni toloay kitakit a midemok (ikor misahirateng to sapatiko to Mancin kitakit nasa), ikor caay to ka laheci, kiemel ko sofitay no Dipong itiya toya mihecaan malefek ko Taywan, saka 50 mihecaan no Dipong mikowan a to'ek to Taywan. O pikowan no Dipong to Taywan i 20-30 mihecaan ranikay ko kacomahanan itiya, nano o mapakomaanay a sera fahal sa o macomahaday nengnengen no hekal, naka o kasasiiked no finacadan i Taywan a ponka, lekakawa, selal malatiih, o pikowan no Dipong to Taywan samatiya to o sofitay ko harateng mirofirof to kalaloodan, kasaniyaro' malefek to no matatekoay kitakit ko pilood. Paherek ko lalood no saka tosa i, o palowad no Taywan ato pinangan no finawlan matatifac to i sakalay Congko, oya to masararemay harateng pinangan a Conghuaminko sifo ko mikowanay to Taywan, honihoni ira ko kasasiwtoc mapapatapatayay a demak, mangalef nano mapidahay kalalood no laloma'an no kitakit malaliway a masaso'otay 'ofad a tamdaw tayni i Taywan, awaayay ko no niyah kitakit a fanawlan no Taywan awaay to ko sapipili' o hayda sanay to, o iraay ho a sowal, ponka, harateng, o malasawaday to a matafo, o latiihay a demak padoedo sa a masadak. Mitiko toninmi a Maguan katatelekan itiya a finawlan no Taywan to saki niyah a 'orip awaayto ko pakayraan, o nika paherek to no kalalood mala o milaliway kahiceraan saka tangasa anini o caay to ko papakaliyas tonini kararoma' no 'orip, misaliyaliyaw ko likisi pasifana' titaanan, o awaayay ko kitakit dengan o tala sanay to pilili'elan. O pahecian no Taywan anini o papotalay mikowanay a Conghuaminko, o nano pikinafalah no 'alomanay tamdaw ko sapicikeroh to ikor no saka nikapolongan a mafalic malalen ko kalalikakawa, sakararid finawlan no Taywan i nikapolongan a telak ko sapilifet to sapi'emod no Congku a parana'an, matiniay a 'orip masakohkohay ato kaoratan, samaanen ko rakat to ikor? Samaanen minengneng ko pakasawayay to nikapolongan a mapoheday nai papotalay tayni a Conghuaminko? O pilifet to taneng no aniniay finawlan no Taywan koni.

…¨~…ģipo~uŇč a masaso~uwa…ĺ, kinapinapina ko~u kasaso~uwa…ĺan saka itini to~u i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ itira i minato~u ma*o~u~uan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a ¶ńßo~u~unfan ńßo~ut…ô…ĺ °o~uripaw ko~u finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan mipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺi ¶iaj "tajwan nipako~uniraan kitakit" sanaj a …ĺa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģan, o~u saka saan i o~u sapiafa…¨~…ģaw to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saka ńßapinaŇčaw no~u kasakitakit a mikińßar to~uni to~u…ĺo~uaj kitakit a mi…¨~…ģ…ômo~uk (iko~ur misańßirat…ôŇč to~u sapatiko~u to~u man ¶in kitakit nasa), iko~ur ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺańß…ô ¶i, ki…ôm…ô…ĺ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itija to~uja mińß…ô ¶aan ma…ĺ…ôf…ôk ko~u tajwan, saka ** mińß…ô ¶aan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč miko~uwan a to~u °…ôk to~u tajwan. o~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u tajwan i **-** mińß…ô ¶aan …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u ta…ĺa sanaj to~u pi…ĺi…ĺi °…ô…ĺan. o~u pańß…ô ¶ian no~u tajwan anini o~u papo~uta…ĺaj miko~uwanaj a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u, o~u nano~u pikinafa…ĺańß no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u sapi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u iko~ur no~u saka nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a mafa…ĺi ¶ ma…ĺa…ĺ…ôn ko~u ka…ĺa…ĺikakawa, sakarari…¨~…ģ finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan i nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a t…ô…ĺak ko~u sapi…ĺif…ôt to~u sapi °…ômo~u…¨~…ģ no~u ¶o~uŇčko~u~u a parana °an, matiniaj a °o~urip masako~uńßko~uńßaj ato~u kao~uratan, samaan…ôn ko~u rakat to~u iko~ur? samaan…ôn min…ôŇčn…ôŇč ko~u pakasawajaj to~u nikapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a mapo~uńß…ô…¨~…ģaj nai papo~uta…ĺaj tajni a ¶o~uŇčńßo~u~uaminko~u? o~u pi…ĺif…ôt to~u tan…ôŇč no~u aniniaj finaw…ĺan no~u tajwan ko~uni.
